title: item report
description: The dev agent's structured result for one item round. `item_id` and `commits` are rewritten by the WORKER after it commits the round's work — an agent-asserted hash never survives.

summary.description: What was changed and why, concretely — the reviewer reads this.

commits.description: Filled by the worker with the real commit hash; leave empty.

claims.description: One entry per acceptance-relevant point: how the diff meets it. Claims are checked adversarially, never trusted.
